/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -Werror -O3 -march=native -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/dnstt-udp.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnstt-udp.dir/src/udp_server.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnstt-udp.dir/src/worker_pool.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnstt-udp.dir/src/session_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnstt-udp.dir/src/performance_monitor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnstt-udp.dir/src/pubkey_generator.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnstt-udp.dir/src/mtu_manager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/dnstt-udp.dir/src/config.cpp.o" -o dnstt-udp  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
